COLLECTION & GEAR

Shards: 0

Equip runes to activate their bonuses. Click a rune from storage to equip it. Click an equipped rune to unequip.

EQUIPPED RUNES

HELMET

ROBE

GEAR STORAGE

Click a piece of gear to equip it. Click an equipped slot to unequip.

Configure your active hotbar assignments. Click an unlocked spell, then click an active slot to assign it.

Slots: 5 / 7
UNLOCKED SPELLS
ACTIVE SLOTS
Drag a spell onto a slot — or select a spell then click a slot.

Earn badges by completing challenges during your odyssey.

DUNGEON MAP

Player Chest Shrine Special Room

SELECT GAME MODE

TUTORIAL

Learn the basics of moving, casting spells, triggering elemental combinations, and equipping gear.

WEAVER MODE

The standard endless spell-weaving challenge. Defeat waves, collect shards, and climb the Leaderboard.

STORY MODE

Unravel the mysteries of the Aether Web in a narrative campaign. (Coming Soon!)

MULTIPLAYER

Co-op with fellow Runeweavers or duel in active PvP arenas. (Coming Soon!)

CUSTOMIZATION

Aether Blue
